content.text:
Based on my visual inspection of the molecule, I can confirm all neighbour atoms of C:19.

## Results

**geomconf_index:** 5431

**Neighbour atoms of atom 19 (Carbon):**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 17 | N (Nitrogen) |
| 20 | C (Carbon) |
| 31 | C (Carbon) |
| 35 | H (Hydrogen) |

Atom C:19 has **4 covalently bonded neighbour atoms**: one Nitrogen (N:17), two Carbon atoms (C:20 and C:31), and one Hydrogen (H:35). This confirms C:19 is an sp³ hybridized carbon with tetrahedral geometry.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 19, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
